title: Mashin Sentai Kiramager vs Ryusoulger
original_title: 魔進戦隊キラメイジャーVSリュウソウジャー
overview: The Mashin Sentai Kiramager and the Kishiryu Sentai Ryusoulger team-up as they end up in a variety of movie worlds produced by Yodonna and filmmaking Jamenshi and Minosaur! Once this movie is complete and released in the world, the Earth will become the same environment as Yodonheim! Can the Kiramagers and Ryusoulgers stop this plan?!
